title: Instance level plan cache may cause "ERROR 8141 assertion failed" in UPDATE stmt under high concurrency
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
UPDATE users SET created_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM users WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: High concurrency with instance plan cache during update statements
